summary: Bug Fix Verified: 'Used PRC = 0' display bug is FIXED. All 11 backend API tests pass. The test user (cbdf46d7-7d66-4d43-8495-e1432a2ab071) correctly shows total_redeemed = 1500 PRC across all endpoints (redeem-limit, user profile, dashboard, admin user-360). Burns are correctly excluded from the calculation.
critical_code_review_comments: get_user_all_time_redeemed() function at line 3614 correctly combines transactions + service collections
Status checks now include 'SUCCESS' uppercase (line 3722) for bank withdrawals
/user/{uid} endpoint at line 8489 now uses centralized get_user_all_time_redeemed() function
/user/{uid}/dashboard endpoint at line 8375 uses get_user_all_time_redeemed() for real-time calculation
get_user_redeem_limit_internal() at line 16416 uses get_user_all_time_redeemed() for consistency
Burns are correctly excluded via burn_types array at line 3627-3630
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data created by main agent
context_for_next_testing_agent: Used PRC = 0 bug is fixed. All redeem limit APIs now correctly calculate total_redeemed using get_user_all_time_redeemed() function. Test user cbdf46d7-7d66-4d43-8495-e1432a2ab071 has 1500 PRC in successful redemptions.

bug_fix_verification.issue: Used PRC = 0 display bug - Redeem limit showed 0 even for users with redemptions
root_cause: get_user_all_time_redeemed had early return preventing backup collections check
/user/{uid} endpoint had duplicate logic not using centralized function
Status checks didn't include 'SUCCESS' uppercase for bank withdrawals
fix_applied: Removed early return in get_user_all_time_redeemed to always check backup collections
Updated /user/{uid} endpoint to use centralized get_user_all_time_redeemed()
Added 'SUCCESS' to status checks in bank withdrawal queries

verification_results.burns_excluded: PASS - Burns not included in Used PRC calculation

features_tested.GET /api/user/{uid}/redeem-limit: PASS - Returns total_redeemed > 0 for users with redemptions
features_tested.GET /api/admin/user-360: PASS - stats.total_redeemed and redeem_limit.total_redeemed are consistent
features_tested.Burns exclusion: PASS - Burns are NOT included in Used PRC calculation
